description: Cross-platform medical-English learning app for Spanish-speaking healthcare professionals

stack.database: PostgreSQL 15+ with RLS on all tables

before_starting: Check SETUP.md for what you must provide (API keys, Apple Developer, etc.)
Run `supabase link --project-ref qjixyztcwqcfdgixdfla` to link the hosted project
iOS: `cd ios/MediLingo && xcodegen generate && open MediLingo.xcodeproj`
Admin: `cd admin && pnpm install && pnpm dev` (http://localhost:3000)

commands.backend_start: cd supabase && supabase start && supabase functions serve
commands.ios_build: cd ios/MediLingo && xcodebuild -scheme MediLingo -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
commands.ci_check: All tests run via GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`): admin lint+build, Supabase migrations, iOS xcodegen+build, JSON schema validation

status.backend: ✓ 13 migrations, 8 functions (6 deployed), RLS on all tables, pg_cron enabled
status.ios: ✓ BUILD SUCCEEDED, all features wired (auth, gamification, StoreKit, offline, referrals, achievements)
status.admin: ✓ Compiled successfully, full CMS (courses, lessons, exercises, quests, achievements, users, analytics, settings)
status.content: ✓ 10 modules / 50 lessons / 210 exercises / 95 vocabulary (AI-drafted, pending physician validation)

next_steps: Fill remaining IAP metadata in App Store Connect (descriptions, screenshots, rating, category, etc.)
Test on Simulator: `xcodebuild ... build` → run in Simulator → open app → test StoreKit purchase flow
Device testing: set up Xcode provisioning (team ID, certificate, profile) → run on iPhone
Physician content validation (editorial review of AI-drafted lessons)
known_gaps: Analytics/Crashlytics not wired (stubs exist, keys needed)
Remote push send path (tables + local reminders ready; needs APNs)
iOS certificate UI (RPC exists, no screen)
